hero.title: Caritas Zimbabwe Roman Catholic Diocese of Mutare
hero.subtitle: Development arm of the Catholic Church and humanitarian response.
hero.description: Serving communities across the Diocese of Mutare with compassion, dignity and practical support.

home.heroImageCaption: Community life and programme work across the Diocese of Mutare

stats.headline: Scale rooted in service, not slogans

thematic.title: Thematic focus
thematic.intro: Our programmes follow Catholic social teaching: dignity, solidarity, and care for those on the margins — including persons with disabilities.

food.title: Food security & livelihoods
food.blurb: Sustainable agriculture, resilience, and income for households.

humanitarian.title: Humanitarian response
humanitarian.blurb: Emergency support, inclusion, and community preparedness.

disability.title: Disability inclusion
disability.blurb: Persons with disabilities in response, recovery, and livelihoods.

community.title: Community & institutions
community.blurb: Infrastructure, coordination with diocese and local structures.

news.intro: Updates from the field and the diocese.

impact.title: Our impact
impact.intro: Glimpses of community engagement and project work across the diocese — the same mission you support when you partner with Caritas.

closingCta.title: Join our mission
closingCta.body: Walk with us in solidarity — through prayer, volunteering, or giving — so that communities across Mutare can live with dignity and hope.

home.whatsappWelcome: Hello! Thank you for your interest in Caritas Mutare. How can we help you today?

about.title: About Caritas Mutare
about.missionText: To serve the poor and promote integral human development through community-based projects that address the root causes of poverty and injustice.
about.visionText: A just and compassionate society where every person can live with dignity and reach their full potential.
about.valuesText: We are guided by Catholic social teaching, working with communities to create lasting change through solidarity, subsidiarity, and the common good.

programs.title: Our Projects
programs.description: We implement various community development projects across the Diocese of Mutare

education.title: Education & Training
education.description: Providing access to quality education and vocational training for children and adults

healthcare.title: Healthcare & Nutrition
healthcare.description: Improving health outcomes through medical care, nutrition projects, and health education

agriculture.title: Agriculture & Food Security
agriculture.description: Supporting sustainable farming practices and food security initiatives

livelihood.title: Livelihood Support
livelihood.description: Creating economic opportunities through microfinance and skills development

soupkitchen.title: Soup Kitchen
soupkitchen.description: Monthly community meals served every last Friday to support vulnerable families

emergency.title: Emergency Response
emergency.description: Providing immediate assistance during crises and natural disasters

donate.title: Support Our Mission
donate.description: Your donation helps us continue our important work in community development
donate.name: Full Name
donate.thankYou: Thank you for your generous donation!

volunteer.title: Volunteer with Us
volunteer.description: Join our mission to serve the community and make a difference
volunteer.thankYou: Thank you for your interest in volunteering!

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with us for more information or to get involved
